This includes attracting private investment, enhancing public-private cooperation, and focusing on missions such as carbon capture, power-to-X, and eco-friendly agriculture. Major programmes like the Energy Technology Development and Demonstration Programme (EUDP) are central to this effort.
source_quote: The green research strategy is focused on four missions: 1) carbon capture, utilisation and storage, 2) power-to-X, 3) climate and eco-friendly agriculture and food production, 4) recycling and reduction of plastic waste.
